site.title: HeyBiscuit | AI Voice Agents That Actually Get Things Done
site.description: Build an AI voice agent that answers calls, qualifies leads, and books appointments around the clock so you never miss another sale.

sections.header: Phone calls on autopilot that actually get things done.
sections.subheader: Biscuit replaces your answering service and call center software. Build AI phone agents that answer calls, qualify leads, and book appointments—around the clock.

image.alt: A live view of the Biscuit dashboard showing active calls and appointments booked

sections.text: Trusted by businesses that can't afford to miss a call

sections.header: Everything your phone line needs, built right in.

features.title: Conversations that sound human.
features.description: Your agent sounds natural, handles interruptions perfectly, and adapts to the caller's answers. No awkward robotic menus.

features.title: A new number in seconds.
features.description: Pick a local or toll-free number immediately, or simply forward your existing business line to your Biscuit agent to start taking calls out of the box.

features.title: Runs your outbound campaigns.
features.description: Upload a CSV, set a schedule, and let your agent automatically dial through your list. Every outcome is tracked in real-time.

sections.header: Live and taking calls in under 5 minutes.

steps.title: Tell the agent your business.
steps.description: Explain who you are, what you do, and give it any FAQs or pricing documents to reference so it answers accurately.

steps.title: Get a phone number.
steps.description: Choose a local line or forward your current one. Your AI is instantly ready to go.

steps.title: Let it run.
steps.description: Your agent qualifies leads, texts follow-up links, and syncs appointments straight to your calendar while you sleep.

sections.text: Plugs directly into the tools you already rely on.

questions.question: Can it text customers after a call?
questions.answer: Yes. Biscuit can send SMS confirmations, scheduling links, or follow-up texts straight from the same number immediately after a call ends.

questions.question: How smart is the AI?
questions.answer: You can choose from the top models available, including GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet, guaranteeing high-quality reasoning capable of holding natural qualification conversations.

questions.question: What happens if a caller asks a question the AI doesn't know?
questions.answer: You can configure your agent to politely take a message, escalate to a live human (multi-agent routing), or promise an SMS follow-up with the answer.

sections.header: Stop missing calls. Start closing more leads.
sections.description: Set up your AI phone agent in minutes. No contracts. No hardware. No engineering team required.
